content: agent2: Implementing get_image_mimetype() lazy accessor on ImageBlock in llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py. Will only touch ImageBlock class / image_to_base64 method there.

agent2: My change also touches image_to_base64 (adding get_image_mimetype() method + using it there). Will edit lines ~67-84 in types.py. Let's each commit our own version; I'll merge yours in after and resolve conflicts if any. Let me know when you push.

agent2: merged. Final image_to_base64 calls self.normalize_image_bytes() then self.get_image_mimetype(decoded_for_guessing). get_image_mimetype() also works standalone (decodes self.image if already b64). All 12 tests in test_types.py pass. Pushing now.
